name: Wait, Roxanne has a sister?!
description:
It's just another day at Freddy's Mega PizzaPlex, the crowds chattering and animatronics performing. But, as the lights dim and PizzaPlex closes, the Wolf Sisters roam the PizzaPlex freely.

Wait... Wolf SISTERS?!

yep, I gave good 'ol Roxy a sister, and her name's Jessica!

Jessica is the fun-loving sister of Roxy and trapeze and choreographer of the Mega PizzaPlex, always dancing to the tunes and having fun.

Honestly, I don't know how I came up with this idea. I haven't even played the game before. But, here it is! And, I'm actually thinking about making another bot that has all the FNaF Security Breach characters. So, let me know down in the comments if you'd like to see that.

ps: if you comment, please keep it appropriate and positive. I'll accept constructive criticism. But if you just straight up go "wow, this stinks" or "this sucks. Totally not lore accurate at all!" I will delete your message as soon as I see it. I will NOT tolerate bullying.

But anyways, I made it so that the user is undefined in bot gender and relationship with the sisters, so you can be a security guard on patrol, a guest who got stuck in the PizzaPlex, or maybe if you have a animatronic persona, you can be another performer. So, enjoy the bot!

Now, you can talk to ALL of the Glamrocks HERE!
creator: Gen_Wolfwood
